title: Probate Paperwork Interview
content:
Probate Paperwork Interview


This note will help us gather all the information for the court forms. You can record your answers right here in the note, one question at a time.


---

How to Record Your Answers


After each question below, you will see a prompt to record.

Follow these steps:

1. Tap on the screen right below the question.

2. Look for the paperclip icon 📎 on the toolbar above your keyboard. Tap it.

3. A menu will pop up. Choose “Record Audio”.

4. A recording bar will appear. Tap the red Record button to start talking.

5. When you’re finished with your answer, tap Done.

6. Your audio recording will appear right under the question. Then you can move to the next one!

Let’s begin. Take your time.

---
context: From document: Probate Paperwork Interview — chunk 1 (chunk 1/5)
